title: sida rhombifolia var. rhomboidea
intro: Sida rhombifolia var. rhomboidea, also known as the Rhombic Sida, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. The medicinal properties of Sida rhombifolia var. rhomboidea include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Sida rhombifolia var. rhomboidea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, as well as being used in traditional folk remedies to treat various ailments.
